data.title: X Games and MoonPay partner to create MoonPay X Games League, a historic multi-year deal in action sports.
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, X Games has formed an exclusive league title partnership with MoonPay, marking the launch of the MoonPay X Games League. The deal, unveiled on January 25, 2026, in Boulder, Colorado, paves the way for an unprecedented collaboration between the two entities for multiple years. MoonPay, renowned as the foremost provider of crypto payments worldwide, has joined forces with X Games to create this innovative new venture.

data.title: Crypto slump impacts Cathie Wood’s ARK ETFs as Coinbase, Circle, and Bullish are added, dragging performance down.
data.description: The decline in cryptocurrencies during the fourth quarter negatively impacted ARK ETFs, with Coinbase being the primary factor contributing to the decrease in performance.

data.title: PENGUIN coin soars 564% post viral White House X; market cap hits $387,000 pre-announcement.
data.description: Before the release of a post by the US White House, the meme cryptocurrency known as the Nietzschean Penguin (PENGUIN) held a market capitalization of around $387,000.

data.title: OCC Comptroller assures impartial review of WLFI charter application amid no political or financial influences.
data.description: The procedural review of World Liberty Financial’s bank charter application by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency will not be influenced by any political or personal financial connections, as stated by the agency.

data.title: Retail investors dump Apple stock, favoring Nvidia and Tesla with $15 billion net purchase since July 2025. Appleverse news roundup.
data.description: In recent tech and entertainment news, Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is observing a downturn in retail investor interest, while Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) are experiencing massive inflows. Since July 2025, Nvidia has witnessed a staggering $15 billion in retail purchases, surpassing all other Magnificent 7 companies combined. Meanwhile, Tesla saw $6 billion in net retail buys, indicating a notable shift in investor preferences within the tech sector. On another note, Netflix Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) and Apple have both secured Best Picture Oscar nominations, with Netflix garnering 16 nods. More details on this news piece can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trump backs A.I. data centers; GOP and locals oppose mega center like 18 Walmarts in Alabama woodland. Residents fear loss of nature.
data.description: Beside Bessemer, Alabama, a dispute arises as residents express strong opposition to the construction of a massive data center equivalent in size to 18 Walmart stores. The planned facility is proposed to be erected in a pristine woodland area. A resident lamented, "All of this natural beauty will vanish once the data center is built."

data.title: THC drink sales soar in January. Rising demand for non-alcoholic buzz with hemp-derived THC. Federal law threatens sales surge.
data.description: There has been a noticeable increase in the sales of beverages containing THC derived from hemp, as consumers seek alternative options for intoxication. This trend is particularly appealing to individuals looking for a high without consuming alcohol. However, these products may face challenges as a new federal regulation could potentially remove them from store shelves.

data.title: Farmers in Mississippi Delta facing tough times as crop prices fall below production costs, especially for rice.
data.description: The costs of production for most key U.S. crops exceed their current market prices. The recent decrease in rice prices is particularly concerning for farmers in Mississippi, further impacting the already struggling agricultural sector in the region.

data.title: Colombia's second-largest pension fund to provide access to Bitcoin-linked fund for qualified investors, without altering core savings allocation.
data.description: Access to the Bitcoin-linked fund by AFP Protección will be restricted to qualified investors, without affecting the primary allocation of Colombian pension savings.

data.title: Halfpricesoft.com offers ezW2 2025 software with W-2 and 1099 Efile service to simplify tax filing. Available now in Redmond, Wash.
data.description: The recently released ezW2 2025 software comes equipped with a convenient W-2 and 1099 Efile service to help meet upcoming deadlines. Available for a test drive now, this software aims to streamline year-end and tax-season filings. The software, provided by Halfpricesoft.com, assists users in securely filing their W-2 and 1099 forms. This announcement was made on January 25, 2026, in REDMOND, Washington.

data.title: AAVE price prediction: $190-195 target by Feb 2026 despite bearish trend. Caution at $155 support.
data.description: Analysts have mixed predictions for the price of AAVE, aiming for a target range of $190-195 by February 2026. However, caution is advised due to current technical indicators pointing towards potential support levels at $155, coupled with bearish MACD momentum.

data.title: LDO expected to hit $0.75-$0.85 by Feb 2026, showing bullish MACD signals and potential 45-64% upside from current levels.
data.description: Lido DAO is displaying positive MACD signals despite the ongoing bearish trend, as analysts predict a target price range of $0.75 to $0.85. This represents a potential increase of 45-64% from the current price levels.

data.title: HBAR expected to hit $0.16 by January, with current support at $0.11. Analysis hints at potential 47% rally.
data.description: An analysis indicates that Hedera's cryptocurrency, HBAR, may see a 47% increase to reach $0.16 by the end of the month. However, current technical indicators are exhibiting a mix of signals, with a support level noted at $0.11. In summary, there is a short-term price prediction indicating potential growth in the near future for HBAR.

data.title: WIF forecast: Short-term target $0.35, medium-term $0.35-$0.40, bullish breakout $0.43, critical support $0.32.
data.description: Summary of WIF Price Projection:- Short-term goal in one week: Reach $0.35- Medium-term forecast within a month: Estimated between $0.35 and $0.40- Bullish breakout point: Target set at $0.43- Crucial support level: $0.32.

data.title: Analysts foresee PEPE hitting $0.00000690 by January 31, 2026, implying 30-35% upside. Technicals are currently neutral.
data.description: According to various cryptocurrency analysts, there is a forecast that PEPE may surge to $0.00000690 by January 31, 2026. This projected increase could yield gains of approximately 30-35%, despite the current neutral technical signals for the digital asset.

data.title: ALGO expected to reach $0.14-$0.19 by Feb 2026; Currently at $0.12, aiming for 16-58% gains towards $0.16-$0.19.
data.description: Algorand's cryptocurrency, ALGO, is currently trading at $0.12, indicating the possibility of significant gains ranging from 16% to 58%. Analysts predict a medium-term target price within the $0.16-$0.19 range, supported by technical indicators pointing towards a potential recovery momentum.

data.title: Curve's CRV sees potential recovery to surpass $0.40-$0.46 range in 2-4 weeks despite bearish trends; $0.37 resistance key.
data.description: Curve (CRV) is expected to reach a price range of $0.40 to $0.46 within the next 2 to 4 weeks amidst efforts to combat oversold conditions. However, bulls may face challenges in the near term as the immediate resistance level is set at $0.37.

data.title: INJ price predicted to reach $5.80-$6.20 by February, with short-term target at $4.65-$4.80. Bullish breakout at $4.65.
data.description: Summary of Price Predictions for INJ:- Short-term target (1 week): Estimated to be between $4.65 and $4.80.- Medium-term forecast (1 month): Expected to fall within the range of $5.80 to $6.20.- Bullish breakout level: Set at $4.65.- Critical support level: Currently at $4.

data.title: FLOKI may reach $0.000048-$0.000055 by Feb, trading near $0.00004278 support. Analysts' targets range from $0.0000286 to $0.000072.
data.description: FLOKI is currently trading close to a crucial support level at $0.00004278 according to technical analysis. Analysts have provided price targets with a bearish scenario of $0.0000286 and a bullish scenario of $0.000072. This indicates a significant range for potential price movements.

data.title: Neutral consolidation for SHIB: Analysts target $0.0000085 resistance by Feb with 22% upside potential if technicals improve. RSI at 42.99.
data.description: The projected price of SHIB displays conflicting indications, as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 42.99 and the MACD momentum indicates a bearish trend. Market analysts are eyeing a resistance level at $0.0000085, suggesting a possible 22% increase in value if there is a positive shift in technical factors.
